metric_definitions.availability: Percentage of the 14 pilot days (Jun 1-14) on which a robot produced at least one telemetry reading.
metric_definitions.active_robots: Registered robots (present in robots.csv) that produced at least one telemetry reading during the pilot window.

anomalies.note: 50 rows use 'PDD_A' (underscore) instead of 'PDD-A' (dash); normalised underscores to dashes before aggregating footfall by zone.
25 navigation events have a blank severity field; left as-is and treated as non-fault (only severity='warn' counts as a fault).
R-99 appears in telemetry.csv but is not in robots.csv; excluded from fleet totals so active_robots does not exceed total_robots.
The state column mixes cases (e.g. 'charging' vs 'CHARGING'); lower-cased all states before computing per-state metrics.
